channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: These families help researchers find Alzheimer's treatments. Their network is at risk
item.description: Families with rare gene mutations that cause Alzheimer's in middle age are giving scientists a unique window on the disease, and a quick way to test potential treatments.
item.content:encoded:
Families with rare gene mutations that cause Alzheimer's in middle age are giving scientists a unique window on the disease, and a quick way to test potential treatments.

(Image credit: Juan Diego Reyes for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Jon Hamilton

item.title: Iran reviews U.S. proposal. And, Rubio to meet Pope Leo after Trump's criticism
item.description: Iran is reviewing the Trump administration's latest proposal to end the war. And, Secretary of State Marco Rubio is meeting Pope Leo XIV amid President Trump's harsh criticism of him.
item.content:encoded:
Iran is reviewing the Trump administration's latest proposal to end the war. And, Secretary of State Marco Rubio is meeting Pope Leo XIV amid President Trump's harsh criticism of him.

(Image credit: Andrew Medichini)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: As federal scientists faced turmoil, the Devils Hole pupfish reached a crisis point
item.description: The Devils hole pupfish lives in just one spot in Death Valley. Wildlife officials have managed this iconic fish for decades, and last spring, just as the Trump administration was laying off all kinds of scientists, the wild population of this fish plummeted to only 20 individuals. Officials then took an irrevocable step.
item.content:encoded:
The Devils hole pupfish lives in just one spot in Death Valley. Wildlife officials have managed this iconic fish for decades, and last spring, just as the Trump administration was laying off all kinds of scientists, the wild population of this fish plummeted to only 20 individuals. Officials then took an irrevocable step.

(Image credit: Olin Feuerbacher)
item.dc:creator: Nell Greenfieldboyce

item.title: Psychiatrists say RFK Jr.'s take on SSRIs is an 'oversimplification' of the problem
item.description: The American Psychiatric Association says too few patients can access comprehensive mental health care in the United States. It welcomes new investments in improving access to evidence-based care.
item.content:encoded:
The American Psychiatric Association says too few patients can access comprehensive mental health care in the United States. It welcomes new investments in improving access to evidence-based care.

(Image credit: Rod Lamkey)
item.dc:creator: Rhitu Chatterjee

item.title: Gas prices keep rising, but do big oil companies plan to drill more? Not so far
item.description: The war in Iran has pushed global oil prices higher, which boosts oil company revenues. But major U.S. oil companies aren't signaling plans to increase production to bring down prices at the pump.
item.content:encoded:
The war in Iran has pushed global oil prices higher, which boosts oil company revenues. But major U.S. oil companies aren't signaling plans to increase production to bring down prices at the pump.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: Camila Domonoske

item.title: Making a podcast helped one family talk about aging, dementia and death
item.description: This year's winner in NPR's College Podcast Challenge is a letter to a grandparent that grapples with health issues including dementia. It's the story of a family learning to talk about hard things.
item.content:encoded:
This year's winner in NPR's College Podcast Challenge is a letter to a grandparent that grapples with health issues including dementia. It's the story of a family learning to talk about hard things.

(Image credit: Matthew Coughlin for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Elissa Nadworny

item.title: Dirty nickel: The cost of mining in Indonesia
item.description: Across six locations in Indonesia, NPR spoke with locals about how nickel mining is changing the land and daily life. It's brought jobs, but also concerns about environmental damage and public health.
item.content:encoded:
Across six locations in Indonesia, NPR spoke with locals about how nickel mining is changing the land and daily life. It's brought jobs, but also concerns about environmental damage and public health.

(Image credit: Claire Harbage)
item.dc:creator: Katerina Barton

item.title: In a new poll, Americans voice broad bipartisan support for age caps in Congress
item.description: The vast majority of Americans — 8 in 10 — say there should be age caps for members of Congress, as well as term limits, according to the latest NPR/PBS News/Marist poll.
item.content:encoded:
The vast majority of Americans — 8 in 10 — say there should be age caps for members of Congress, as well as term limits, according to the latest NPR/PBS News/Marist poll.

(Image credit: Allison Robbert)
item.dc:creator: Elena Moore

item.title: Campaign staffers tell NPR they make 'thousands' betting on their own candidates
item.description: Campaign staffers are turning private polling data into personal paydays. They describe the election prediction market as a "Wild West" for staffers.
item.content:encoded: Campaign staffers are turning private polling data into personal paydays. They describe the election prediction market as a "Wild West" for staffers.
item.dc:creator: Luke Garrett

item.title: Border czar promises 'mass deportations are coming' to fulfill Trump's promises
item.description: The remarks contrast with Border Czar Tom Homan's softer messaging earlier this year, after two U.S. citizens were killed by immigration officials in Minneapolis.
item.content:encoded:
The remarks contrast with Border Czar Tom Homan's softer messaging earlier this year, after two U.S. citizens were killed by immigration officials in Minneapolis.

(Image credit: Brendan Smialowski)
item.dc:creator: Ximena Bustillo
